description: Change-point detection (pelt): post/pre > 1.0x (behavioral)
Change-point detection (cusum): post/pre > 1.0x (high_value)
Change-point detection (pelt): post/pre > 2.0x (high_value)
Change-point detection (cusum): post/pre > 1.0x (last_12_months)
Change-point detection (pelt): post/pre > 1.0x (last_12_months)
Change-point detection (variance_change): post/pre > 2.0x (all)
Change-point detection (variance_change): post/pre > 3.0x (all)
Paid per claim > 2x peer median for T1019
sql_template:
WITH code_peers AS (
                    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY paid_per_claim) AS median_ppc,
                           COUNT(*) AS num_peers
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND claims >= 50
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.paid_per_claim, ph.claims, ph.paid,
                       ph.paid_per_claim / NULLIF(cp.median_ppc, 0) AS ratio, cp.median_ppc
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_peers cp
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND ph.claims >= 50 AND cp.num_peers >= 30
                  AND ph.paid_per_claim > 2 * cp.median_ppc
                ORDER BY ph.paid DESC LIMIT 50

description: Total claims > 10x peer median for T1019
sql_template:
WITH code_peers AS (
                    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY claims) AS median_claims
                    FROM provider_hcpcs WHERE hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND months_active >= 12
                )
                SELECT ph.billing_npi, ph.claims, ph.paid, ph.months_active,
                       ph.claims / NULLIF(cp.median_claims, 0) AS ratio
                FROM provider_hcpcs ph CROSS JOIN code_peers cp
                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = 'T1019' AND ph.months_active >= 12 AND ph.paid > 100000
                  AND ph.claims > 10 * cp.median_claims
                ORDER BY ph.paid DESC LIMIT 50

                WHERE ph.hcpcs_code = '99213' AND ph.months_active >= 12 AND ph.paid > 100000
                  AND ph.claims > 10 * cp.median_claims
                ORDER BY ph.paid DESC LIMIT 50
